{{Quote|For all the bumps and bruises, this hero stuff definitely helps you sleep better at night.|Korlo Brightwater on [[Shelkonwa]]|<ref name="Allegiance (novel)">[[Allegiance (novel)|''Allegiance'']]</ref>}}
'''Korlo Brightwater''', call sign '''TBR 479''', was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] as a [[Scout trooper/Legends|scout trooper]]. Brightwater went on to join the [[Empire of the Hand]].

==Biography==
Serving as of [[0 BBY/Legends|0.5 ABY]] with the call number TBR 479, he was stationed on the [[Reprisal (Imperial II-class)|''Reprisal'']] under [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Natrom]] with a partner named [[Tibren]]. He would become a member of the [[Hand of Judgment]] with [[Daric LaRone]], [[Taxtro Grave]], [[Saberan Marcross]], and [[Joak Quiller]] because of [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Drelfin|Dreflin]]'s accidental death. He would also [[Skirmish on Shelkonwa|support]] Mara Jade in the arrest of Governor Choard. He rides on one of the speeder bikes on the Suwantek they commandeered after Major Drelfin's death.

{{Char-stub}}
